title: yacaph #3254
definition:
1) to add, increase, do again
    1a) (Qal) to add, increase, do again
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to join, join oneself to
        1b2) to be joined, be added to
    1c) (Hiphil)
        1c1) to cause to add, increase
        1c2) to do more, do again
